# Num Num's Bakery

> Num Num's Bakery is a 100% eggless cake shop in Sydney, Australia, with two retail locations (Harris Park and Riverstone). Every product is made without eggs — suitable for vegetarians and Jain dietary requirements. Custom cakes are made fresh to order with 48 hours notice.

## About

Num Num's Bakery was founded in 2019 and has served the Sydney community with eggless cakes, sweets, and pastries ever since. The business is family-owned and community-focused, with roots in Harris Park — one of Sydney's most vibrant South Asian neighbourhoods. A second store opened at Riverstone Shopping Centre in December 2024.

Key facts:
- 100% eggless — no eggs in any product, ever
- Jain-friendly and fully vegetarian
- Custom celebration cakes (birthday, wedding, baby shower, kids, corporate)
- 15+ flavours including Rasmalai, Ferrero Rocher, Butterscotch, Mango, Strawberry, Pineapple, Chocolate Truffle, Red Velvet, Black Forest, and more
- Cakes available from 6" (serves 6–8) to 16" (serves 50–55) and multi-tier
- Minimum 48 hours notice required for custom orders
- Orders placed via WhatsApp or phone
- 4.6-star Google rating

## Locations

**Harris Park Store (Original)**
Address: 96/96 Wigram Street, Harris Park NSW 2150
Hours: Daily 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM
Phone: +61 425 697 725
Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Num+Nums+Bakery/@-33.8206078,151.0089521

**Riverstone Store (Opened December 2024)**
Address: Shop 8, Riverstone Shopping Centre, Riverstone NSW 2765
Hours: Monday–Friday 6:00 AM – 8:00 PM · Saturday–Sunday 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM
Phone: +61 425 697 725
Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Num+Nums+Bakery+Riverstone/@-33.6785397,150.8610698

**Factory (not open to public)**
Address: 2/4 Nelson Road, Yennora NSW 2161
